title: [Verif] Add more AssertLike canonicalizers
body:
Add some more, missing canonicalizers of asserts, assumes, and covers  Specifically:

1. If an assert/assume/cover is always enabled, remove the optional enable.
2. If an assert/assume is always disabled, delete it.
3. If an assert's/cover's condition is an always true (new) BooleanConstantOp,
   then delete it.

This technically fixes #9277.  There is still a missing improvement where
binds of empty modules can be dropped entirely because, it is impossible
for them to have any effect (or to be the target of other binds).

Note: covers are kept in even if constant true. This is intentional because covers are part of a "verification contract" and we shouldn't be messing with them. Just because something is known to the compiler to be trivially covered, doesn't mean we should make DV's coverage metrics worse and also subtly modify the test plan (which is often realized via covers). This decision could be revisited in the future.

This is stacked on #9280.
